description: Summarizes inspection-result values on current registered passenger-car records. Use for overall approval outcome distribution. For brand pass rates use dmr-car-inspection-pass-rate-by-brand; for age bands use dmr-car-inspection-by-age.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY inspection_result = SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 10
